title: How to Apply
excerpt: Domestic staff members: Domestic staff applications for Summer 2026 will open on November 3, 2025. Please return to this page on that date and follow the instructions below to apply. Complete the employment application. New staff members are required to submit three references. The reference form will be emailed to your identified references upon submission […]
contentHtml:
Domestic staff members:

Domestic staff applications for Summer 2026 will open on November 3, 2025. Please return to this page on that date and follow the instructions below to apply.

  1. Complete the employment application.
  2. New staff members are required to submit three references. The reference form will be emailed to your identified references upon submission of your application. Your references should be non-relatives who have observed your character and work ethic in an employment, academic, athletic, or social leadership position. Please ask your references to submit the form within 1 week of receiving the request.
  3. Within one week of submitting your application, we will email you a Calendly link to schedule a Zoom interview with a member of our full-time team. New applicants must ensure that all of their references have been submitted prior to their interview date.

Application Materials

New Staff Applicants:  Submit your application here, beginning on November 3, 2025. A new window will open and you will be instructed to log in or create an account. If you need any assistance, please email summer@campbarney.org. Please use your email address, not your parent’s.

Returning Staff: Apply by logging in to your Camp Account, beginning on November 3, 2025.  Please use your email from last year. If you have a new one, it can be changed later.

International staff members:

Apply now through a staffing agency such as Camp America, Camp Leaders, or JAFI and request to be interviewed by Camp Barney Medintz.

For any questions about employment at Camp Barney Medintz, please contact summer@CampBarney.org.

Domestic staff members:

Domestic staff applications for Summer 2026 will open on November 3, 2025. Please return to this page on that date and follow the instructions below to apply.

Complete the employment application.

New staff members are required to submit three references. The reference form will be emailed to your identified references upon submission of your application. Your references should be non-relatives who have observed your character and work ethic in an employment, academic, athletic, or social leadership position. Please ask your references to submit the form within 1 week of receiving the request.

Within one week of submitting your application, we will email you a Calendly link to schedule a Zoom interview with a member of our full-time team. New applicants must ensure that all of their references have been submitted prior to their interview date.
